name: Toad in the Whole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix flour, sea salt, and black pepper.
2. Make a well in the center of the mixture and add eggs.
3. Beat the eggs thoroughly, gradually incorporating more flour until combined.
4. Gradually add milk and water, whisking for 4 to 5 minutes.
5. Pour dripping into a large roasting pan and place in a hot oven (450°F or 230°C).
6. Allow the drippings to heat for 5 minutes until smoking hot.
7. Pour the batter over the sausages, spacing them evenly.
8. Bake at moderately hot temperature (400°F or 200°C) for 40 minutes, adjusting if the batter browns too quickly.
